title: Data Science for Industry

prerequisites.text: Acceptance into the Master's course in Data Science or quantitative background deemed sufficient by Head of Department.

outline: The goal is to provide an applied, hands-on overview of selected topics useful in the working world of data science not covered by other modules. Topics fall into two themes: (1) Workflow/productivity tools and skills — data wrangling (reading/writing data, webscraping, accessing APIs), version control with Git, and visualisation and communication of data and results (ggplot2, R shiny); (2) Modelling — recommender systems, text mining and basic natural language processing, and feedforward and convolutional neural networks.
dp_requirements: At least 40% for the assignments section.
assessment: Assignments: 50%. Examination: 50%. A sub-minimum of 40% for each of the assignment and examination component will be required.
